meaning: adj.芳香的,温和的,止痛的,(空气)温和的
examples: Eventually passion was distilled into the natural beauty of a balmy night.
Those were golden days and balmy nights!
It was April, balmy and warm.
New Yorkers and tourists were jammed into the streets on this balmy 60-degree evening.
In the winter the peaks may be covered in snow, while the coast remains relatively balmy.
